_comment: Live result from @cf/baai/bge-base-en-v1.5 on the agent-skills-pack@v1.0.0 corpus (7 skills, 35 paraphrases, 50 past intents on base64-encode). Run via the Cloudflare connector on 2026-04-27.

failures.B_summary: 23/35 misranked — base64-encode (the 50-use skill) won 23 unrelated queries about http-get, http-post-json, github-issue-create, ripgrep-search, read-file, json-query. The +0.196 global boost overwhelmed cosine.

E.q: submit a JSON payload via http
make an HTTP POST with a request body
